links.evidence: |year=2016 |title=Chrysocolaptes validus |volume=2016 |article-number=e.T22681549A92910730 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2016-3.RLTS.T22681549A92910730.en |access-date=9 June 2025}} | genus = Chrysocolaptes | species = validus | authority = (Temminck, 1825) | synonyms = Reinwardtipicus validus }} The orange-backed woodpecker (Chrysocolaptes validus) is a bird in the woodpecker family Picidae, found in southern Thailand, Malaya, Sarawak and Sabah in Malaysia, Brunei, Sumatra, and Java
